profiles.name: Minimal
profiles.description: 10 agents + /forge command. No skills, no hooks. Good for getting started.

profiles.name: Standard
profiles.description: Full pipeline: 10 agents + 30 skills (engineering, Java, pipeline, specialized, SuperClaude) + quality hooks + rules + plugin MCP servers. Recommended for most engineers.

profiles.name: Full
profiles.description: Everything — standard profile + tracking hooks (backlog, session summary, team cleanup) + cost profiler + session intelligence (save/load + SessionStart/PreCompact/SubagentStart hooks) + optional `code-review-graph` MCP (tree-sitter structural graph, 28 review tools; requires `uv` on PATH; approval prompt on first install).
